site.name: Boring Tools
site.description: Free, fast online tools that run entirely in your browser. Nothing to install, no sign-up, nothing leaves your device.

categories.title: Text & Writing
categories.description: Count words, convert case, generate placeholder text and more.

categories.title: Developer Tools
categories.description: Format code, encode data, test regex, generate hashes and other developer utilities.

categories.title: Converters
categories.description: Convert between units, formats, encodings and data types.

categories.title: Security & Privacy
categories.description: Generate strong passwords, hashes and secure identifiers.

tools.title: Password Generator
tools.description: Generate strong, random passwords with a secure crypto RNG.

tools.title: Word Counter
tools.description: Count characters, words, sentences and reading time as you type.

tools.title: Case Converter
tools.description: Convert text to UPPER, lower, Title, camelCase, snake_case and more.

tools.title: UUID Generator
tools.description: Generate random RFC 4122 v4 UUIDs in your browser.

tools.title: Base64 Encode / Decode
tools.description: Convert text to and from Base64, with full UTF-8 support.

tools.title: JSON Formatter
tools.description: Beautify, minify and validate JSON with clear error messages.

tools.title: Unit Converter
tools.description: Convert length, weight and temperature between common units.

tools.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
tools.description: Generate placeholder paragraphs of dummy text for your layouts.

tools.title: Timestamp Converter
tools.description: Convert Unix timestamps to dates and back. Auto-detect seconds vs milliseconds.

tools.title: URL Encoder & Decoder
tools.description: Encode and decode URLs with full UTF-8 support for international characters.

tools.title: Binary Decimal Hex Converter
tools.description: Convert between binary, decimal, hexadecimal and octal instantly.

tools.title: JWT Decoder
tools.description: Decode JWT tokens instantly — see header, payload and expiration.

tools.title: Hash Generator
tools.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 and SHA-512 hashes from any text.

tools.title: Rot13 & Caesar Cipher
tools.description: Encode and decode Rot13, Caesar cipher with custom shift, and Atbash cipher.

tools.title: Markdown Preview Editor
tools.description: Write Markdown and see a live rendered preview. Split-pane editor, no signup.

tools.title: Regex Tester & Debugger
tools.description: Test regular expressions with live match highlighting and group capture details.

tools.title: CSV to JSON Converter
tools.description: Convert between CSV and JSON formats instantly. Handles quoted fields.

tools.title: QR Code Generator
tools.description: Generate QR codes for any URL or text. Choose size, colors, error correction. Download PNG or SVG.

tools.title: Cron Expression Generator
tools.description: Build cron expressions from dropdowns. See the next 5 run times before you commit.

tools.title: HMAC Generator
tools.description: Generate HMAC-SHA256 and HMAC-SHA512 signatures from a message and secret key.

tools.title: Protobuf Decoder
tools.description: Decode protobuf binary data into a readable tree. Paste hex or base64 — auto-detects format.
